articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Leo Radvinsky became a billionaire after investing in the site, known for its pornographic content.
articles.title: OnlyFans owner Leonid Radvinsky dies at 43

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The health firm backed by actor Idris Elba and broadcaster Jonathan Ross is being bought by Danone, reportedly for €1bn (£860m).
articles.title: Danone buys meal supplement maker Huel

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Three-year-old Aarav Chopra died during a biopsy when his artery was pierced by a trainee doctor.
articles.title: Apology for poor care over Wolverhampton boy's bleed death

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The government is looking at ways to make much-delayed London to Birmingham railway line cheaper to deliver.
articles.title: HS2 train speeds could be cut to save money

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Colombia's defence minister says it was a 'tragic accident' but the cause is not yet clear.
articles.title: Colombian Air Force plane crashes with many soldiers on board

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: BBC media editor Katie Razzall says the former Google exec has been chosen for his insider knowledge of big tech.
articles.title: Would ex-Google boss Matt Brittin be the right person to steer the BBC?

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Tomos is one of thousands with ME in Wales, with services described as “a desert” for those most affected.
articles.title: ME: Swansea man was active but now he can't walk or talk at 28

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Some of the products are "unsafe to eat", the Food Standards Agency says.
articles.title: Moma Foods porridge recalled over possible mouse contamination

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: A household with an average income of £55,000 has cut spending on leisure activities by £40 a week, offical figures suggest.
articles.title: 'We can't justify a £52 lunch': Middle-income families cut back on fun as prices rise

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Energy prices fall and stock markets rebound after the US president says "very good and productive" talks have been held.
articles.title: Oil falls and shares rebound after Trump says talks have been held to end war
